caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background features a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items, including garments with "LEE" branding. On-screen graphics appear in the lower sections, including a logo for "BOSS TALK JOY" and a logo that says "PODCAST" beneath "BOSS TALK JOY." As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and begins to gesture with his right hand, eventually lifting it toward his head in a motion of adjustment or emphasis. The scene remains static in terms of location and lighting, focusing on the man's upper body and facial expressions as he communicates.
